descs.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 3 or more, Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, gain Clash Power +1 for every 2 Speed difference (max 3)
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
[StartBattle] Consume 6 [Breath] Count on self to gain +2 Atk Weight for this Skill
[StartBattle] Consume 6 [Breath] Count on self to gain +2 Atk Weight for this Skill

If this unit's Speed is faster than the main target's, gain Clash Power +1 for every 2 Speed difference (max 3)
[StartBattle] Consume 6 [Breath] Count on self to gain +2 Atk Weight for this Skill

If target has [MarkOfButler], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +7 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain 5 [Breath]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Binding] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 20% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] If target is Staggered, deal +20% Damage on Critical Hit
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [MarkOfButler]

descs.desc:
If target has [MarkOfButler], Clash Power +1
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, gain Coin Power +1 for every 2 Speed difference (max 2)
[WhenUse] Gain +7 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain 5 [Breath]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Binding] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 30% of damage dealt 
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [MarkOfButler]

[OnSucceedAttack] If target is Staggered, deal +40% Damage on Critical Hit
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [MarkOfButler]
[EnemyKill] Reuse Skill once on a random target with [MarkOfButler]
(Does not activate on Reuse. Does not activate when there are no remaining targets with [MarkOfButler])

descs.desc:
[OnSucceedEvade] Heal 3 SP (5 times per turn)
[OnSucceedEvade] Gain +1 [Breath] Count(5 times per turn)

1040801.name: Clearing Household Chores
1040801.desc:
On Hit against targets with [MarkOfButler], gain 1 [Agility] next turn (3 times per turn)
On Crit against targets with [MarkOfButler], eliminate [MarkOfButler] on target; then, if this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, deal +5% Damage on Critical Hit for every 1 Speed difference (max 30%)

1040811.name: Clearing Household Chores
1040811.desc:
On Hit against targets with [MarkOfButler], gain +1 [Breath] Count, and gain 1 [Agility] next turn (3 times per turn)
On Crit against targets with [MarkOfButler], eliminate [MarkOfButler] on target; then, if this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, deal +10% Damage on Critical Hit for every 1 Speed difference (max 60%)

1040821.name: Cleaning Command
1040821.desc: When the ally that was deployed last wins a Clash, gain +1 [Breath] Count (3 times per turn)

1040831.name: Cleaning Command
1040831.desc: When the ally that was deployed last wins a Clash, gain +1 [Breath] Count (3 times per turn), and gain 1 [Agility] next turn (once per turn)
